content.rendered:
FLAT ROOFING
COMPANY CALGARY

Finding the right flat roofing company in Calgary can be a difficult decision. Whether your flat roof is a commercial building or a residential dwelling, you want the best professional to handle your roof. Many flat roofing companies in Calgary install flat roofs without proper insurance and surety bond, which can lead to a disastrous loss if something went wrong. This is why you always want to research your flat roofing contractor before making a decision on which company you choose to install your flat roof.

GET A QUOTE

Flat Roofing Services In Calgary

CALGARY FLAT ROOFING COMPANY

Flat Roof Repairs

Flat Roof Replacements

Flat Roof  Installations

Torched-On Roof Repairs

Flat Roof Evaluations

Flat Roof Maintenance

RESIDENTIAL ROOFING

DON’T LET YOUR HOME BE AT RISK. KEEP YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES SAFE WITH OUR TRUSTED RESIDENTIAL ROOFING SPECIALISTS.

COMMERCIAL ROOFING

OUR COMMERCIAL ROOFING SERVICES ARE OFFERED ALL YEAR. WE MAKE SURE ALL SAFETY AND BUILDING CODES ARE STRICTLY FOLLOWED.

FLAT
ROOFING

Prevent leaks, or worse, a collapsed roof with our consistent and reliable flat roofing services.

ROOF REPLACEMENT

WHEN IT COMES TO YOUR ROOF REPLACEMENT, WE REPAIR UNTIL WE NEED TO REPLACE. THAT IS OUR WORKMANSHIP GUARANTEED .

EXTERIORS

EXTERIORS ARE BUILT FOR YOUR PROTECTION. OUR EXTERIORS GO BEYOND THAT BY OFFERING QUALITY AESTHETIC CRAFTSMANSHIP 

Why choose to work with Calgary’s top rated roofing company

We are 100% in-house staff; we do not use ANY subcontractors.

This allows us to maintain complete control of scheduling, workmanship and clean up after your roof repairs or replacement is completed.

We don’t rent bins; we have our own dump trailers.

This not only allows us to maintain control of scheduling, but it ensures you won’t have a bin blocking your driveway for a week. We remove our dump trailer daily.

We have an office and warehouse.

90% of the Calgary roofers work out of their home! Are they real Calgary roofing companies? Or just salesmen who subcontract?

Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

We provide all of our roof replacements with a Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

CALL US TODAY

PROCESS WITH CITY ROOFING & EXTERIORS

QUOTE

We provide competitive quotes so you know you are getting the best price in the industry, without having to compromise quality workmanship for your exteriors.

PLAN

Our extensive planning allows for a swift and smooth operation, on schedule and without any hassle. Our details make the difference in your quality. 

INSTALL

We begin our installation by ensuring all objects are out of the way or covered. We begin our work promptly on schedule and complete our installation on-time.

CLEAN

Cleaning is done right after any work is complete. The drop-sheets and coverings protect your area and allow for quick and spotless clean. We leave nothing behind.

INSPECT

Quality guarantee is what we pride ourselves on. A full inspection is administered by a site manager and client approval is what completes the project.

Flat roof replacements can be extremely costly and sometimes not necessary. Flat roof repairs can often fix any leaks or drainage issues and add more years to your flat roof. We provide free flat roof inspections and use advanced tools such as thermal imagery and moisture meters to determine the condition of your roof. If necessary, we will then provide flat roof repairs for a fraction of the replacement cost. When it comes to flat roofing in Calgary, we’re the team that can do it all. 

Check Out Our Blog

Your Team For Flat Roofing In Calgary

TESTIMONIALS

Highly recommend this company to anyone looking to get their roof replaced. Incredible prices and workmanship. Entire job was done in only about 8 hours. Cody was a pleasure to be in communication with, he is knowledgeable and extremely friendly. He even made time for me to come by his office and choose a shingle colour in person because I could not decide on one from the pictures. I am extremely pleased with the service I received.
Sarim T.
A friend recommended City Roofing to fix some bad leaks on my flat roof. Ken and Codi came out to have a look and later that day Ken explained to me where the problem areas are (texted me pictures as well) and the cost to fix. Ken was in constant contact, replying to my texts after hours and on weekends. What great service!! (And very reasonable price) We had lots of rain since then, no leaks! Highly recommend these guys!!
Chris L.
Highly Recommended. We had had a minor roof problem since we moved into our house 10 years ago. Our builder said it was not a roof problem and told us instead how we could maintain our house better. Fast forward 10 years later, even though we had followed the builder's instructions, the problem had deteriorated, and there were water leaks and molds. Upon a friend's recommendation, we contacted City Roofing for help.
Cody came to our home, analyzed the problem and answer all the questions I had. He and another roofer came again later in the week with all the parts and tools and fixed our roof. They did other repairs for us that were outside of scope. We are very grateful for their help. Highly recommended.
Read More
Albert L.
Inspect the Interior

Using a thermal camera and moisture meter, our roof inspector will carefully examine the property’s interior. This can allow us to determine if there has been a leak and to pinpoint the location and severity. 

Inspect the Building Envelope

Our flat roof inspector will determine if there are other unforeseen issues with the property besides the flat roof, such as eavestroughs, downpipes, scuppers, windows, flashing/ cladding, masonry and the structural integrity of the property.

Flat Roof Inspection

Our flat roof inspector will do a photo report and report critical issues such as sloping, drainage, pooling, flashing, rooftop unit, ventilation, and mechanical. After evaluating these key points, we will be able to determine the estimated remaining lifespan of your flat roof.

Flat Roof Inspection Report

Our flat roof inspector will create a detailed report using the photos and findings. We will determine the best course of action to take for your flat roof and create a corresponding proposal. This will detail for each concerning area the severity of the issue and what the recommended course of action should be.

Contact Our Company For Flat Roofing

Having a flat roof inspection on your property can prevent potential costly issues that may arise. Sometimes a simple flat roof repair can save you thousands of dollars. Our experienced Calgary Roofing Company’s flat roof inspectors use the latest technology and in-depth analysis techniques to analyze your flat roof. Here are the four phases of our flat roofing inspection:

GET A QUOTE

FAqs

How do I know if my business needs a new flat roof?

If there is unexplained mold, water stains, condensation or in extreme cases, a leak. We can help determine if your business needs a new flat roof.

How long does it take to install a new flat roof?

The size of the job, type of roofing, any existing damage and the weather can all effect how long your commercial roofing installation will take. Our experts will provide you with a timeline after our free consultation.

How do I choose the right flat roofing contractor?

Choosing the right flat roofing contractor to trust can be daunting. Ask your flat roofing contractor what kind of training they do with their crews and what certifications they hold with suppliers and industry organizations. Also, make sure they have all the proper licences and insurance.

How long should my flat roof last?

A flat roof should last 20 – 50 years. This is dependent on the type of product installed along with the correct ventilation.
